Home Make a Submission?

Zucchini Pie

Mary Germick

Prep time -

Cook time -

Yield: 6 servings

Ingredients

4 cups Shredded Zucchini 1 cup Chopped Onion 1/4 cup Melted Butter 2 Tbl. Parsley 1/4 tsp. Garlic Powder 1/4 tsp. Basil 1/4 tsp. Oregano 8 oz pkg. Pillsbury Crescent Rolls 8 oz. Shredded Mozzarella Cheese 2 Eggs, beaten

Directions

  1. Saute first seven ingredients.
  2. Then combine with beaten eggs and cheese.
  3. Pour all into a greased 10 in” pie pan that has been lined with the pkg. of Crescent Rolls.
  4. Bake @ 325 for 30 minutes. Cool for 10 minutes before cutting.

If doubled, this will fit into a 9” X 13” pan.
